title: The Problem with AI Agents No One is Talking About | Yutori, Abhishek Das
summary: Abhishek Das, co-founder of Yutori, argues that the AI agent industry has normalized unreliability, with errors compounding quickly across multi-step workflows even at 90% per-step accuracy. He emphasizes that shipping reliable agents requires focusing on taste, dogfooding practices, and building proof of work into AI systems rather than pursuing raw performance gains.
